'''âp-j-th''' ('''kapajath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vajazzle|vajazzle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vajazzle|vajazzle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-j-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapajath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipajath|thipajath]] || [[word:jipajath|jipajath]] || [[word:shipajath|shipajath]] || [[word:kipajath|kipajath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupajath|thuthupajath]] || [[word:jujupajath|jujupajath]] || [[word:shushupajath|shushupajath]] || [[word:kukupajath|kukupajath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupajath|thupajath]] || [[word:jupajath|jupajath]] || [[word:shupajath|shupajath]] || [[word:kupajath|kupajath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupajath|thupajath]] || [[word:jupajath|jupajath]] || [[word:shupajath|shupajath]] || [[word:kupajath|kupajath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepajath|thepajath]] || [[word:jepajath|jepajath]] || [[word:shepajath|shepajath]] || [[word:kepajath|kepajath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopajath|thothopajath]] || [[word:jojopajath|jojopajath]] || [[word:shoshopajath|shoshopajath]] || [[word:kokopajath|kokopajath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopajath|thopajath]] || [[word:jopajath|jopajath]] || [[word:shopajath|shopajath]] || [[word:kopajath|kopajath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopajath|thopajath]] || [[word:jopajath|jopajath]] || [[word:shopajath|shopajath]] || [[word:kopajath|kopajath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpajath|thĂŠpajath]] || [[word:jĂŠpajath|jĂŠpajath]] || [[word:shĂŠpajath|shĂŠpajath]] || [[word:kĂŠpajath|kĂŠpajath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapajath|thathapajath]] || [[word:jajapajath|jajapajath]] || [[word:shashapajath|shashapajath]] || [[word:kakapajath|kakapajath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapajath|thapajath]] || [[word:japajath|japajath]] || [[word:shapajath|shapajath]] || [[word:kapajath|kapajath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapajath|thapajath]] || [[word:japajath|japajath]] || [[word:shapajath|shapajath]] || [[word:kapajath|kapajath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapajath|shapajath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapajath|goshapajath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapajath|gokishapajath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapajathnĂŒ|shapajathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapajathnknĂŒ|goshapajathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajathnĂŒ|gokishapajathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapajathshĂ«|shapajathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapajathnkshĂ«|goshapajathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapajathshĂ«|gokishapajathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajathro|shapajathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajathnkro|goshapajathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajathro|gokishapajathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajathmu|shapajathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajathnkmu|goshapajathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajathmu|gokishapajathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapajathsher|shapajathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapajathnksher|goshapajathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapajathsher|gokishapajathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapajathng|shapajathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapajathnkng|goshapajathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapajathng|gokishapajathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapajathya|shapajathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapajathnkya|goshapajathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapajathya|gokishapajathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapajathyam|shapajathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapajathnkyam|goshapajathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapajathyam|gokishapajathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajathnĂŒshĂ«|shapajathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapajathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapajathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajathnĂŒro|shapajathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajathnknĂŒro|goshapajathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajathnĂŒro|gokishapajathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajathnĂŒmu|shapajathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajathnknĂŒmu|goshapajathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajathnĂŒmu|gokishapajathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajathshĂ«nĂŒ|shapajathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapajathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapajathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajathshĂ«ro|shapajathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajathnkshĂ«ro|goshapajathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajathshĂ«ro|gokishapajathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajathshĂ«mu|shapajathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajathnkshĂ«mu|goshapajathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajathshĂ«mu|gokishapajathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajathronĂŒ|shapajathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajathnkronĂŒ|goshapajathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajathronĂŒ|gokishapajathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajathroshĂ«|shapajathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajathnkroshĂ«|goshapajathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajathroshĂ«|gokishapajathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajathromu|shapajathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajathnkromu|goshapajathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajathromu|gokishapajathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajathmunĂŒ|shapajathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajathnkmunĂŒ|goshapajathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajathmunĂŒ|gokishapajathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajathmushĂ«|shapajathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajathnkmushĂ«|goshapajathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajathmushĂ«|gokishapajathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajathmuro|shapajathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajathnkmuro|goshapajathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajathmuro|gokishapajathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
